[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100101101 5
2 010010010 3
3 101000011 4
4 001101110 5
5 011000111 5
6 111101111 8
7 101000011 4

45 54 000000000 a
56 65 101000011 4 match 3 7
67 76 101000011 4 match 3 7
70 07 100000110 3
